title: Wither's Wrath Other Versions
description: Alternative Release of Wither's Wrath by ImHer0 but with Pre Made Settings ready to play out of the box without having to toggle manually and more compatible with modpacks!
body:
**THIS WAS MADE TO PROVIDE OTHER VERSION DOWNLOADS SPECIFICALLY FOR PRESETS OF THE PACK (e.g. Bedrock Wither Parity)** If this is the first time you seen this pack, please go here instead: ### Current Available Verions
All Minecraft Versions - **Bedrock Version** - Parity version with Bedrock - **Spawn Requirement** - Requires Bad Omen for modified Wither to spawn
1.21.11 specific - **High HP** - Made as a request for a modded pack essentially has insanely high HP and Higher Damage
> People kept downloading the wrong versions on the main page so I made this version.
